content: Enterprise RAG permission leaks: once content is embedded, source ACLs evaporate unless carried as metadata; post-retrieval filtering leaks because the LLM already processed unauthorized chunks in its reasoning chain; stale ACL snapshots persist revoked access (terminated employees can still retrieve); revocations must propagate via change detection; policy enforcement point before LLM input is the recommended pattern. Sources: kirkryan.co.uk, unified.to, truto.one, ragaboutit.com, Glean docs, Knostic.
